title: Tile
description: A selectable tile presents a choice with a label and optional description. Commonly used for mutually exclusive options in a card-like layout.
whenToUse: For visual, card-like option selection (e.g. "Upload CSV / Manual Entry / API Sync"). When you want more prominence than radio buttons.
whenNotToUse: For simple text-only choices — use radio buttons. For navigation — use nav.
_legacyAccessibilityNotes: Use aria-selected for selection state. Tiles are keyboard-focusable (tabindex="0") unless disabled.
